items.title: Polite Society is leveraging Ulta Beauty's new TikTok Shop for its largest-ever affiliate campaign
items.summary: Polite Society is rolling out its most ambitious affiliate campaign to date, focused on its hero product via Ulta Beauty's TikTok Shop integration.

items.title: Vaseline is turning 2008 beauty hacks into TikTok Shop sellouts
items.summary: After selling out its Vaseline Originals debut in Thailand, the Unilever-owned brand is expanding to TikTok Shop US with nostalgia-driven beauty hacks.

items.title: Knix embarks on its biggest wholesale expansion, opening in 350 Target stores
items.summary: The 13-year-old company has surpassed $1 billion in DTC sales to date while seeing a 90% year-over-year increase in wholesale.

items.title: DHL Express and Hong Kong-based Designer Eric Wong Reimagine Retired Uniforms for New Line
items.summary: The door-to-door courier and logistics company is also supporting sustainable-minded designers.

items.title: Traditional Shoe Incumbents Could Lose Ground to Agile Challengers
items.summary: A consumer focus on product innovation and value spend could shift brand momentum in 2026.

items.title: From Messi to Mbappé, These Are the Most Popular World Cup Jerseys to Buy Right Now
items.summary: We the best World Cup jerseys to buy for this year's tournament, from official team kits to fan-made.

items.title: Weavabel Partners With Bombiix to Make Digital Product Passports
items.summary: The companies offer an integrated DPP solution to the often-fragmented fashion industry.

items.title: Paul Smith Sets Up Residency on Shelter Island
items.summary: The British designer has reimagined the Sunset Beach Hotel for the remainder of June.

items.title: The reality of AI supply chain hype
items.summary: Kearney's 2026 State of Logistics Report shows that AI is helping streamline operations, even as adoption remains uneven.

items.title: L Catterton Reinforces Its Expert-Led Brand Thesis With Rōz Investment
items.summary: In a beauty M&A market fixated on scale, L Catterton bets on expert-led brands with its investment in Rōz haircare.

items.title: Evenmouth Brings A Clinical Edge To Oral Care's Longevity Conversation
items.summary: Evenmouth launches clinical-grade oral care products targeting longevity-conscious consumers in the US market.

items.title: French Fragrance Brand Fascent Raises $1.5M To Fuel U.S. Growth
items.summary: As investor interest in fragrance remains strong, French brand Fascent raises $1.5M to expand in the US market.

items.title: AI is now doing parts of merchants' jobs, managing products and vendors
items.summary: Retailers are beginning to use AI to automate certain parts of the merchandising process.

items.title: 5 things to watch for this Prime Day
items.summary: Prime Day is expected to draw more shoppers this year, with consumers hunting for deeper discounts, especially in beauty and personal care.

items.title: Is Prime Day still worth it?
items.summary: This week's Modern Retail Podcast looked at the pros and cons of participating in Prime Day for beauty brands.

items.title: Vaseline Originals launches TikTok Shop US with nostalgia skincare hacks - sold out in Thailand, expanding NA
items.summary: Vaseline Originals (Unilever) drove TikTok sellouts by reviving 2008 beauty hacks (slugging, skin barrier repair). Hero product: Vaseline Originals Petroleum Jelly. Strategy: viral content + TikTok Shop affiliate. Price range $5-15 USD. Signals strong demand for affordable skincare basics in NA TikTok commerce.

items.title: Rōz Milk Hair Serum (Mara Roszak) receives L Catterton minority investment - prestige expert-led haircare
items.summary: L Catterton invested in Rōz Hair (founder: celebrity hairstylist Mara Roszak). Hero product: Milk Hair Serum. Keywords: prestige haircare, expert-led brand, hair treatment serum. Price band: $28-45 USD. Signals: PE capital flowing to expert-backed hair serums targeting premium NA consumer.

items.title: French fragrance brand Fascent raises $1.5M for US market entry - affordable perfume positioning
items.summary: Fascent (French fragrance brand) raised $1.5M angel funding targeting US affordable fragrance market. Keywords: affordable fragrance, French scent, US expansion. Price band: sub-$50 USD. Signals: ongoing investor interest in accessible fragrance for NA market.

items.title: Polite Society lip product powers Ulta Beauty TikTok Shop largest-ever affiliate campaign
items.summary: Polite Society (lip care brand) runs its largest affiliate campaign through Ulta Beauty's new TikTok Shop integration. Hero product: lip product (inferred from thumbnail 'polite-society-lip.jpg'). Signals: TikTok Shop + Ulta omnichannel affiliate strategy emerging as key NA beauty distribution model. Price band estimated $12-25 USD.
